grace.message_one: Your {{what}} has ended — {{count}} grace day left. Renew on the Billing page to keep access.
grace.message_other: Your {{what}} has ended — {{count}} grace days left. Renew on the Billing page to keep access.

banned.message: Your subscription has ended and profile launching is locked. Subscribe or enter a purchase code on the Billing page.

gateway.title: Payment methods
gateway.description: Super Admin only. Enable the methods shown to owners at checkout and store each provider’s keys.
gateway.footnote: Keys are encrypted at rest on this machine and never leave it. Checkout is poll-based (no webhooks), so cross-install enforcement still needs the licensing backend. Wise & Manual are approved by you under “Pending payments” below.

manual.title: Pending payments
manual.description: Manual (Wise / bank transfer) submissions awaiting your approval.

affiliate.title: Affiliate & Referral Links
affiliate.description: Your partner URLs for the Proxy marketplace “Purchase” buttons. Leave blank to use the Softglaze default.
affiliate.savedMsg: Saved. Marketplace buttons now use your links.
affiliate.footnote: These links power the “Purchase at…” / “Visit dashboard” buttons on the Proxy pool → Providers tab. They are public referral URLs only — proxy tokens and credentials are never affected.

developerApi.title: Developer API Access
developerApi.description: Generate API keys and run a local REST server to control Softglaze programmatically.

errors.load: Could not load developer API settings.
errors.toggleServer: Could not change the local server state.

keys.title: API Keys
keys.copyOnce: Copy this key now — it is shown only once and cannot be recovered.

server.title: Local REST API
server.curlExample: Example: launch a profile via cURL
server.footnote: The server only accepts requests from this machine and requires a valid Bearer key.

migration.title: Transfer Profiles
migration.description: Import your existing profiles from another anti-detect platform via its API.
migration.tokenFootnote: Your token is used once for this transfer and is never stored. Local platforms (AdsPower, ixBrowser) must be running with their Local API enabled.

log.title: Migration log
log.waiting: Waiting for the platform to respond…

dolphin.warning: Cookies won't be transferred if you're transferring from Dolphin's free plan.
